text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky is told to rest in the infirmary since
she's not feeling well.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'll rest up and get back on the
track—fatigue-free—in no time! Check you
later! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh my, where am I? And where is everyone else?

text_block_list.name: New Human A
text_block_list.text:
It is now 120 million years into your future. An ice
age has destroyed the world of the past,
including its products.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
How awful... My trainer and everyone else
are—wait, even Italian food, Bavarian cream, and
tiramisu are gone?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
How awful... My trainer and everyone else
are—wait, even Italian food, Bavarian cream, and
tiramisu are gone?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
There's still crop tops and orange smoothies,
right? The cutting edge stuff is still around,
right?!

text_block_list.name: New Human B
text_block_list.text: No. You are all that remains.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Bogus! What am I supposed to do in a place like this?
It's okay, Maruzen!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Those screeching tires... Could it be... TATA?!

text_block_list.name: Tata
text_block_list.text: We may have lost the trendy fashions, but we still have you!

text_block_list.name: Tata
text_block_list.text:
You have to tell them! It's what your trainer
would've wanted!

text_block_list.name: Tata
text_block_list.text:
You have to tell them! It's what your trainer
would've wanted!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Tata... Trainer... You're right. This is no time to sit
around moping!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Tata... Trainer... You're right. This is no time to sit
around moping!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Listen, everyone! As the hippest person in this
time, I must pass on knowledge of the
bomb-diggitiest trends!

text_block_list.name: New Human C
text_block_list.text:
Is this... the "disco" spoken of in legend? I can
feel a "groove" building up inside of me!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That's the way! Come on, everyone! Shake your
groove thangs and bring those fly moves back!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Was that all... a dream?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
What a strange dream... But I really feel like I
accomplished something great! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to a good rest, Maruzensky seems to have
gotten her groove back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky's efforts have made hip trends
flourish on New Earth. But one day...

text_block_list.name: New Human C
text_block_list.text:
The roof! The roof! The roof of the disco club is
on fire! The probability it will burn down is too
high—we do not need water!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: We do need water! Take a chill pill, and get some water!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Noooo! Totally boguuuus!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Huh? I-it was a dream...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps because of some strange dreams,
Maruzensky still feels tired even after resting.
